description: Create a two-column content slide on high-earning millennials' travel activity participation, with KPI callouts on the left and a grouped vertical bar chart on the right.

header.headline: High-earning millennials are packing their trips with more activities than other travelers

items.label: more travel activity types planned for their marquee trips than other travelers
participation rate in most travel activities compared to other travelers

labels: Guided day trip or sightseeing tour
right.title: Participation in in-destination travel activities

footer.source: Note: Question: “Which of the following experiences are you likely to participate in on this trip?” (Select all that apply) (n = 117 millennials with income over $200,000; n = 96 millennials with income over $200,000 who are traveling). Source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey. Copyright © 2026 Deloitte Development LLC. All rights reserved.
